name: barwise-vscode
description: ORM 2 modeling tool for data engineers and architects
author: Gabe Schenz

barwise.llmProvider.description: LLM provider for transcript extraction. 'copilot' uses your GitHub Copilot subscription (no API key needed). 'anthropic' uses the Anthropic API directly.

barwise.anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key (only used when llmProvider is 'anthropic'). Leave empty to use the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.

barwise.anthropicModel.description: Anthropic model ID (only used when llmProvider is 'anthropic').

barwise.copilotModelFamily.description: Copilot model family to prefer (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-sonnet'). Leave empty to use the default available model.

barwise.verboseLogging.description: Log detailed LLM interaction data (prompt length, raw response, token usage, latency) to the output channel.

barwise.enableMcpServer.description: Enable the built-in MCP server. When enabled, barwise ORM tools (validation, verbalization, schema generation, diagram, diff, merge, transcript import) are available to Copilot Chat and other MCP-aware AI tools.

chatParticipants.name: barwise
chatParticipants.description: ORM 2 data modeling expert -- import transcripts, validate models, generate schemas and diagrams

commands.name: import
commands.description: Import a transcript into an ORM model

languageModelTools.name: barwise_validate_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validate an ORM 2 model from a YAML string or .orm.yaml file path. Returns structured diagnostics including errors and warnings with rule IDs.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file, or inline YAML content of an ORM model

languageModelTools.name: barwise_verbalize_model
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate FORML natural-language readings for fact types and constraints in an ORM 2 model. Produces human-readable sentences describing each fact type and its constraints.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file, or inline YAML content of an ORM model

factType.description: Specific fact type name to verbalize. Omit to verbalize all fact types.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_generate_schema
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate a relational schema from an ORM 2 model. Maps object types and fact types to tables, columns, and keys. Output can be DDL SQL or JSON mapping.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file, or inline YAML content of an ORM model

format.description: Output format: 'ddl' for CREATE TABLE SQL statements, 'json' for the relational mapping as JSON. Defaults to 'ddl'.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_diff_models
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Compare two ORM 2 models and return the structural deltas. Shows added, removed, and modified elements with breaking-level indicators (safe, caution, breaking).

base.description: File path or inline YAML for the base (original) model

incoming.description: File path or inline YAML for the incoming (changed) model

languageModelTools.name: barwise_generate_diagram
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate an SVG diagram from an ORM 2 model. Returns SVG markup showing object types, fact types, constraints, and their relationships.

source.description: File path to an .orm.yaml file, or inline YAML content of an ORM model

languageModelTools.name: barwise_import_transcript
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Process a business domain transcript through LLM extraction to produce a formal ORM 2 model in YAML. Uses the configured LLM provider (Copilot by default, no API key needed).

transcript.description: The transcript text content, or a file path to a text/markdown file containing the transcript

modelName.description: Name for the resulting ORM model. Defaults to 'Extracted Model'.

languageModelTools.name: barwise_merge_models
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Merge an incoming ORM model into a base model. Accepts all additions and modifications, rejects removals. Returns the merged model as YAML with validation results.

base.description: File path or inline YAML for the base (original) model

incoming.description: File path or inline YAML for the incoming model to merge in
